languages.text: "Элантах, пусть обитатели этого мира и научились выживать среди его корней, их попытки ориентироваться в них все еще неуклюжи. Я могу научить твоих слуг использовать ресурсы планеты для создания особых ловушек, и они сами станут себе защитой от зла, что ее терзает".

traits.locale_text: "Элантах, пусть обитатели этого мира и научились выживать среди его корней, их попытки ориентироваться в них все еще неуклюжи. Я могу научить твоих слуг использовать ресурсы планеты для создания особых ловушек, и они сами станут себе защитой от зла, что ее терзает".

languages.text: "Elantach, the people of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, but their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."
languages.original_text: "Элантах, пусть обитатели этого мира и научились выживать среди его корней, их попытки ориентироваться в них все еще неуклюжи. Я могу научить твоих слуг использовать ресурсы планеты для создания особых ловушек, и они сами станут себе защитой от зла, что ее терзает".

traits.locale_text: "Elantach, the inhabitants of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, yet their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."

"Elantach, the people of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, but their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."

"Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

"Elantach, the inhabitants of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, yet their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."

"Elantach, the people of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, but their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."

languages.text: 「エランタチ、あなたの種族に宿る破壊への無意識の衝動に屈すなかれ。私はあなたのしもべに多くのことを教えることができる。そして、彼らは、ドルーバーの一匹が現れるずっと前に、誘い餌の区域から姿を消すだろう。そうすることで、彼らのスキルが磨かれ、世界は完結するだろう」
languages.original_text: "Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

traits.locale_text: 「エランタチ、あなたの種族に宿る破壊への無意識の衝動に屈すなかれ。私はあなたのしもべに多くのことを教えることができる。そして、彼らは、ドルーバーの一人が現れるずっと前に、誘い餌の区域から姿を消すだろう。そうすることで、彼らのスキルが磨かれ、世界は完結するだろう。」

languages.text: «Elantach, la gente de este mundo puede haber aprendido a sobrevivir entre sus raíces, pero sus intentos de recorrerlas son torpes. Puedo enseñar a tus sirvientes a utilizar los recursos del planeta para fabricar trampas especializadas. Así, ellos mismos se convertirán en un baluarte contra el mal que lo plaga».
languages.original_text: "Elantach, the people of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, but their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."

traits.locale_text: «Elantach, la gente de este mundo puede haber aprendido a sobrevivir entre sus raíces, pero sus intentos de recorrerlas son torpes. Puedo enseñar a tus sirvientes a utilizar los recursos del planeta para fabricar trampas especializadas. Así, ellos mismos se convertirán en un baluarte contra el mal que lo plaga».

languages.text: “外界人，这个世界的人类或许已经学会如何在这些根系之间生存，但他们对这种环境的利用还相当笨拙。我可以教会你的仆从运用这颗行星的资源，制作特制陷阱。如此一来，他们就能自己组成一道壁垒，抵御侵扰这颗行星的邪恶。”
languages.original_text: "Elantach, the people of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, but their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."

traits.locale_text: “外界人，这个世界的人类或许已经学会如何在这些根系之间生存，但他们对这种环境的利用还相当笨拙。我可以教会你的仆从运用这颗行星的资源，制作特制陷阱。如此一来，他们就能自己组成一道壁垒，抵御侵扰这颗行星的邪恶。”

languages.text: "Elantach, die Bewohner dieser Welt mögen gelernt haben, zwischen ihren Wurzeln zu überleben, aber ihre Navigationsversuche sind nach wie vor unbeholfen. Ich kann Eure Diener lehren, die Ressourcen des Planeten für die Herstellung spezialisierter Fallen zu nutzen. So werden sie selbst ein Bollwerk gegen das Böse, das sie heimsucht."
languages.original_text: "Elantach, the people of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, but their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."

traits.locale_text: "Elantach, die Bewohner dieser Welt mögen gelernt haben, zwischen ihren Wurzeln zu überleben, aber ihre Navigationsversuche sind nach wie vor unbeholfen. Ich kann Eure Diener lehren, die Ressourcen des Planeten für die Herstellung spezialisierter Fallen zu nutzen. So werden sie selbst ein Bollwerk gegen das Böse, das sie heimsucht."

languages.text: "Bu dünyanın insanları, kökleri arasında hayatta kalmayı öğrenmiş olabilir elantach ama onların arasında yön bulma girişimleri hâlâ çok beceriksizce. Hizmetkârlarına gezegenin kaynaklarını kullanarak özel tuzaklar kurmayı öğretebilirim. O zaman bizzat kendileri, buraya musallat olan kötülüğe karşı bir siper olur."
languages.original_text: "Elantach, the people of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, but their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."

traits.locale_text: "Bu dünyanın insanları, kökleri arasında hayatta kalmayı öğrenmiş olabilir elantach ama onların arasında yön bulma girişimleri hâlâ çok beceriksizce. Hizmetkârlarına gezegenin kaynaklarını kullanarak özel tuzaklar kurmayı öğretebilirim. O zaman bizzat kendileri, buraya musallat olan kötülüğe karşı bir siper olur."

languages.text: « Elantach, les habitants de ce monde ont beau être habitués à coexister avec ses racines, elles n'en restent pas moins difficiles à dompter. Je peux apprendre à vos serviteurs à exploiter les ressources de la planète pour en faire des pièges sur mesure. Ils deviendront alors un rempart contre le mal qui la ronge. »
languages.original_text: "Elantach, the people of this world may have learned to survive among its roots, but their attempts to navigate them remain clumsy. I can teach your servants to use the planet's resources to craft specialised traps. Then they themselves shall become a bulwark against the evil that plagues it."

traits.locale_text: « Elantach, les habitants de ce monde ont beau être habitués à coexister avec ses racines, elles n'en restent pas moins difficiles à dompter. Je peux apprendre à vos serviteurs à exploiter les ressources de la planète pour en faire des pièges sur mesure. Ils deviendront alors un rempart contre le mal qui la ronge. »
